title: Invent & Wander
author: Jeff Bezos
subline: Collected writings of the world's first trillionaire founder.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- Two arrows: a curved one (wander) on the left, a straight precise one (invent) on the right. They cross. The crossing point is RED. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 900)" fill="none" stroke-width="2">
    <!-- Left: curving wander arrow -->
    <path d="M-480 0 C -380 -240, -180 -240, -40 0 C 80 200, 240 200, 320 0" stroke="#cccccc"/>
    <polygon points="320,0 300,-18 290,12" fill="#cccccc" stroke="none"/>

    <!-- Right: straight precise arrow -->
    <path d="M-380 220 L 380 -220" stroke="#cccccc"/>
    <polygon points="380,-220 360,-216 370,-200" fill="#cccccc" stroke="none"/>

    <!-- Crossing point — the red dot where the two arrows meet -->
    <circle cx="20" cy="44" r="14" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <circle cx="20" cy="44" r="32" fill="none" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.4"/>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: Two arrows cross at the upper-center: a curving 'wander' path and a precise straight 'invent' path. Their intersection is a single red dot — the moment the wandering becomes invention. The 360px mixed-case title 'Invent & Wander' is split, with 'Invent' in the top half and '& Wander' below the visual. Single red = the meeting point.
